name: io.github.dalisecurity/fray
title: Fray — WAF Security Testing MCP Server
description: AI-powered WAF security testing toolkit. 5,500+ attack payloads across 24 OWASP categories, 25 WAF vendor fingerprints, 21 automated recon checks. Tools: analyze scan results, generate WAF bypass strategies, explain vulnerabilities, list payload categories, get WAF signatures.
